fixes.rationale: Catch rejected async switch submissions so shutdown-time ThreadPool::Execute failures return false to the caller, which already marks the URMA switch attempt failed and releases the tracker gate.
Update the parameter documentation to describe the implemented fixed/tumbling statistics window instead of a sliding window.
fixes.suggested_patch: * @param[in] windowLengthMs Fixed statistics window duration in milliseconds; a later request settles the previous full window.

skipped.reason: Correct remediation is deleting the newly added transcript file; the suggestion evidence format only represents line replacement text, so a safe file-deletion patch is not expressible here.
Avoiding the extra payload_info scan requires changing FillUrmaBuffer or its return contract across the URMA Get path, which is a structural edit rather than a safe small contiguous suggestion.
